server/tests/test_exif.py :: _build_exif_app1
def _build_exif_app1(*, orientation: int = 6, make: str = "TestCam") -> bytes:
    make_bytes = make.encode("ascii") + b"\x00"
    ifd_start = 8
    entry_count = 2
    ifd_header_size = 2 + entry_count * 12 + 4
    string_offset = ifd_start + ifd_header_size

    tiff = bytearray()
    tiff.extend(b"II")
    tiff.extend(struct.pack("<H", 0x002A))
    tiff.extend(struct.pack("<I", ifd_start))
    tiff.extend(struct.pack("<H", entry_count))
    tiff.extend(struct.pack("<HHII", TAG_ORIENTATION, TYPE_SHORT, 1, orientation))
    tiff.extend(struct.pack("<HHII", TAG_MAKE, TYPE_ASCII, len(make_bytes), string_offset))
    tiff.extend(struct.pack("<I", 0))
    tiff.extend(make_bytes)
    return b"Exif\x00\x00" + bytes(tiff)

server/tests/test_exif.py :: _inject_app1
def _inject_app1(jpeg: bytes, app1_payload: bytes) -> bytes:
    segment = b"\xFF\xE1" + struct.pack(">H", len(app1_payload) + 2) + app1_payload
    return jpeg[:2] + segment + jpeg[2:]

server/tests/test_exif.py :: test_read_exif_orientation_and_make
def test_read_exif_orientation_and_make() -> None:
    base = encode_jpeg(solid_raster(12, 10, 40, 80, 120), quality=90)
    payload = _inject_app1(base, _build_exif_app1(orientation=6, make="TestCam"))
    exif = read_exif(payload)
    assert exif.orientation == 6
    assert exif.tags.get("Make") == "TestCam"
    assert exif.tags.get("orientation_label") is None
    assert exif.to_dict()["orientation_label"] == "rotate_90_cw"

server/tests/test_exif.py :: test_strip_jpeg_metadata_removes_exif
def test_strip_jpeg_metadata_removes_exif() -> None:
    base = encode_jpeg(solid_raster(8, 8, 10, 10, 10))
    payload = _inject_app1(base, _build_exif_app1())
    stripped = strip_jpeg_metadata(payload)
    assert read_exif(stripped).tags == {}
    assert stripped.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")

server/tests/test_exif.py :: test_apply_orientation_swaps_dimensions_for_90_cw
def test_apply_orientation_swaps_dimensions_for_90_cw() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(20, 10, 100, 50, 25)
    rotated = apply_exif_orientation(raster, 6)
    assert rotated.width == 10
    assert rotated.height == 20

server/tests/test_exif.py :: test_convert_applies_orientation_by_default
def test_convert_applies_orientation_by_default() -> None:
    base = encode_jpeg(solid_raster(30, 20, 90, 90, 90))
    payload = _inject_app1(base, _build_exif_app1(orientation=6))
    output, target = convert_image(payload, "photo.jpg", "png", max_mb=2, apply_orientation=True)
    assert target.extension == "png"
    assert len(output) > 0

server/tests/test_exif.py :: test_convert_can_disable_orientation
def test_convert_can_disable_orientation() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(30, 20, 90, 90, 90)
    base = encode_jpeg(raster)
    payload = _inject_app1(base, _build_exif_app1(orientation=6))
    with_orientation, _ = convert_image(
        payload,
        "photo.jpg",
        "jpg",
        max_mb=2,
        apply_orientation=True,
    )
    without_orientation, _ = convert_image(
        payload,
        "photo.jpg",
        "jpg",
        max_mb=2,
        apply_orientation=False,
    )
    assert len(with_orientation) > 0
    assert len(without_orientation) > 0
